creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-06-05 22:03:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-LaTeX-TOM Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module provides a parser which parses and interprets (though
  not fully) LaTeX documents and returns a tree-based representation
  of what it finds. This tree is a LaTeX::TOM::Tree. The tree contains
  LaTeX::TOM::Node nodes.
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/LaTeX-TOM/
  
  PR:             ports/135245
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1343    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-TOM/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-TOM/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-TOM/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/textproc/p5-LaTeX-TOM/pkg-plist (new)
